self_improvement.claim: Directive Workspace can carry this bounded Architecture slice forward into direct adoption without reopening the prior Engine, handoff, and post-consumption evidence chain by hand.
self_improvement.mechanism: The bounded closeout now records an adoption-ready Architecture result and paired decision artifact directly on the bounded-result record.
self_improvement.baseline_observation: Before this closeout, the reopened bounded slice still depended on manual interpretation to decide whether it could move forward as retained Directive-owned Architecture output.
self_improvement.expected_effect: The bounded result 'Updated shared/lib/architecture-bounded-closeout.ts to require explicit validation-method naming for evaluator-oriented bounded results instead of treating proof as a bare boolean. Proof executed by npm.cmd run check plus structural inspection of the GPT Researcher reviewer-criteria, SimpleQA, and hallucination-eval source signals; the concrete code delta is C:/Users/User/.openclaw/workspace/directive-workspace/shared/lib/architecture-bounded-closeout.ts.' can now move directly into the normal adoption/materialization path as Architecture-owned output.

decision.rationale: The mechanism passed review, met adoption readiness, and remains valuable as Directive-owned Architecture output.
decision.runtime_threshold_check: yes - the mechanism is still valuable without a runtime surface, so Architecture should retain product-owned value
